title: abies × insignis var. kentiana
intro: Abies × insignis var. kentiana, commonly known as Fraser fir or Kent fir, is a coniferous tree species within the fir family, Pinaceae. It is valued for its fragrant foliage and medicinal properties. The essential oil extracted from its needles has antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, making it useful in wound healing, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations such as tinctures, infusions, and essential oil can be used to harness the health benefits of Kent fir, including reduced stress, improved respiratory health, and enhanced immune function.
